focus: Batch 2 (deeper): compiled deep contracts vs source, mutation_boundaries + gate completeness, presentation .txt completeness, argv/flag-isolation, advisor trigger_phrase collisions, prompt-injection hygiene
noveltyJustification: Confirmed git-verified compiled-contract staleness across all three deep commands plus a manifest/on-disk hash mismatch for ai-council, a worse-than-known doctor presentation-menu reachability gap, dead (never-harvested) doctor route trigger_phrases, and a cross-family mutation-boundary schema inconsistency.

graphEvents.label: Are compiled contracts, mutation boundaries, and presentation menus internally honest
All three deep compiled contracts are stale vs sourceDigests
Ai-council contract on-disk mismatches its own manifest row
Doctor presentation menu omits skill-graph-freshness entirely
Doctor route trigger_phrases are never harvested by advisor
Non-doctor confirm YAMLs lack mutation_boundaries schema
Compiled contract sourceDigests and git history
Doctor presentation, routes manifest, and advisor harvest code

label: Doctor presentation startup menu and subsystem table omit skill-graph-freshness target entirely
Doctor _routes.yaml trigger_phrases are documented as advisor-consumed but never harvested
doctor_fable-mode.yaml lacks structured mutation_boundaries block used by all nine siblings
All three compiled deep contracts are stale against sourceDigests; ai-council on-disk also mismatches its own manifest row
No non-doctor confirm YAML declares the structured mutation_boundaries schema used by doctor routes
Compiled command contracts must be regenerated whenever any sourceDigests-listed file changes
Manifest rows for a compiled contract must match the contract's current on-disk bytes
Every numbered presentation menu option must map to a route that exists in _routes.yaml, and every _routes.yaml route must have a reachable menu option
A file's own header comment claiming a consumer relationship must be verified against that consumer's actual code path
mode-registry.json and three SKILL.md files changed via real commits after Jul 8 23:44 compile timestamp
deep_ai-council.contract.md on-disk sha256 differs from its own manifest's last recorded compiledContractSha256
skill_advisor.py _load_doc_trigger_phrases only harvests skills/*/{references,assets}/*.md, never commands/doctor/_routes.yaml
doctor_speckit_presentation.txt startup menu and manifest table both list exactly nine of ten routes

direction: Doctor _routes.yaml trigger_phrases collide live with system-skill-advisor SKILL.md phrases
reason: The apparent overlap on 'skill graph freshness' is inert: doctor route trigger_phrases are never read by the advisor's harvester at all, so there is no live routing collision, only dead-code documentation drift.

direction: Apply the same argv/flag-isolation review lens to /doctor:mcp and /doctor:update
reason: Both are simple two-branch (install|debug, migrate-flag) routers without _routes.yaml-style multi-target enumeration, so the cross-target flag-injection risk that motivates /doctor's target-first parsing rule does not apply to them.

direction: Treat deep-ai-council's missing prompt-injection clause as a gap
reason: deep-ai-council has no WebFetch/WebSearch grant and no arbitrary/untrusted-content ingestion path, unlike deep-research (WebFetch) and deep-review (arbitrary review targets); the absence of the clause is correct, not a defect.
